summary: Completed testing of file_missing detection and reupload functionality after GridFS migration. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all key elements present.

backend: GET /pieces/{id} returns file_missing=false when file exists
File download works when file exists
File preview works when file exists
Delete file from GridFS directly (simulate missing file)
file_missing=true after file deleted from GridFS
GET /pieces/{id} returns file_missing=true when file absent
Shared file access works when file exists
Shared file returns 404 when file missing
ZIP export includes files from GridFS
frontend: Registration form works with all fields
Dashboard shows user stats and dossier list
Dossier view page loads with all UI elements
Stat cards present (total, to-verify, ready, errors)
Missing files alert banner code verified (data-testid='missing-files-alert')

seed_data_creation: Test files created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: file_missing detection and reupload functionality fully tested. All file operations work correctly with GridFS. The file_missing field is computed by checking storage.file_exists() in list_pieces and get_piece endpoints. Reupload endpoint at POST /pieces/{id}/reupload accepts file upload and restores the file in GridFS. Frontend has missing files alert banner (data-testid='missing-files-alert'), reupload button (data-testid='reupload-btn-{id}'), and file missing badge (data-testid='file-missing-badge-{id}'). AI analysis is MOCKED due to budget exhaustion on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/dossiers/{id}/pieces - returns file_missing=true/false for each piece

reupload_functionality.behavior: Accepts file upload, saves to GridFS, updates piece record, returns file_missing=false

zip_export.behavior: Includes files from GridFS in ZIP archive

shared_file_access.behavior: Returns 404 when file missing, 200 when file exists

mocked_apis.ai_analysis: MOCKED - Gemini AI analysis not working due to budget exhaustion on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
